sources.title: Scream And Scream Again 1970
sources.description: A serial killer in London claims his victims, including several young women, and drains them for blood. The police follow the leads and reach a house owned by a deranged scientist.

metadata.Plot: In London, a serial-killer drains the blood of females and the Detective Superintendent Bellaver and his team are hunting down the so-called Vampire Killer. Meanwhile in an undefined country that lives a military dictatorship, the cruel Konratz is climbing positions killing The Power that Be. When the Vampire Killer flees from the police, he seeks refugee at the real estate of scientist Dr. Browning and jumps into a tank of acid. Dr. David Sorel is intrigued with the powerful acid and decides to get a sample. He finds the truth about the research of Dr. Browning.
metadata.Actors: Vincent Price, Christopher Lee, Peter Cushing
